title: Authentication of a third party app

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am trying to integrate a system with monday.com for which creating an integration recipe.

My concern is whenever a person click on this recipe he/she should get a pop up for filling in the credentials, Just the same way we do for inbuilt app provided by monday.com.

Just wanted to know if it is possible and if it is then how we are going to achieve that?

third-party-auth1646×578 58.9 KB

Sharing the screenshot for more clarity.

posts.author: Mounika (Mounika)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have similar requirement. Did you find a way to do it?

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mounika,

Yes If I remember it right, my team got the way for that. feel free to reach out at aquibcs@outlook.com

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: Mounika (Mounika)
posts.cookedHtml: Ohh that’s great. I sent mail please check.
